message:
feat(wasm): add JS/TS exports coverage contract tests (3qv04.8.3.1)

18 contract tests validating package entrypoints from a consumer POV:
- Export map structure (conditional root, types subpath, tracing)
- Type declaration consistency (top-level vs exports, dist location)
- Module resolution patterns (ESM, bundler resolution, project refs)
- Source file import chain verification
- Package name scoping and directory convention

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
